function[T0: Monoid, T1: Monoid](x0: MonoidHom[T0, T1], x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { Option.some[MonoidHom[T0, T1]](x0) != MonoidHom.new[T0, T1](x1) or x0.hom(x2) = x1(x2) }[M, P](compose_monoid_hom[M, N, P](f, g), compose[M, N, P](f.hom, g.hom), w0)

goal: lhs.hom = compose[A, B, D](compose_monoid_hom[B, C, D](f, g).hom, h.hom)
proof: let w0: A satisfy { lhs.hom(w0) != compose[A, B, D](compose_monoid_hom[B, C, D](f, g).hom, h.hom, w0) }

function[T0: Monoid, T1: Monoid, T2: Monoid](x0: MonoidHom[T1, T2], x1: MonoidHom[T0, T1], x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0.hom, x1.hom, x2) = compose_monoid_hom[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1).hom(x2) }[A, B, D](compose_monoid_hom[B, C, D](f, g), h, w0)

goal: compose_monoid_hom[B, C, D](f, g).hom = compose[B, C, D](f.hom, g.hom)
proof: let w0: B satisfy { compose_monoid_hom[B, C, D](f, g).hom(w0) != compose[B, C, D](f.hom, g.hom, w0) }

function[T0: Monoid, T1: Monoid, T2: Monoid](x0: MonoidHom[T1, T2], x1: MonoidHom[T0, T1], x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0.hom, x1.hom, x2) = compose_monoid_hom[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1).hom(x2) }[B, C, D](f, g, w0)

goal: lhs.hom = compose[A, B, D](compose[B, C, D](f.hom, g.hom), h.hom)
rhs.hom = compose[A, C, D](f.hom, compose_monoid_hom[A, B, C](g, h).hom)
proof: let w0: A satisfy { rhs.hom(w0) != compose[A, C, D](f.hom, compose_monoid_hom[A, B, C](g, h).hom, w0) }

function[T0: Monoid, T1: Monoid, T2: Monoid](x0: MonoidHom[T1, T2], x1: MonoidHom[T0, T1], x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0.hom, x1.hom, x2) = compose_monoid_hom[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1).hom(x2) }[A, C, D](f, compose_monoid_hom[A, B, C](g, h), w0)

goal: compose_monoid_hom[A, B, C](g, h).hom = compose[A, B, C](g.hom, h.hom)
proof: let w0: A satisfy { compose_monoid_hom[A, B, C](g, h).hom(w0) != compose[A, B, C](g.hom, h.hom, w0) }

function[T0: Monoid, T1: Monoid, T2: Monoid](x0: MonoidHom[T1, T2], x1: MonoidHom[T0, T1], x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0.hom, x1.hom, x2) = compose_monoid_hom[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1).hom(x2) }[A, B, C](g, h, w0)

goal: rhs.hom = compose[A, C, D](f.hom, compose[A, B, C](g.hom, h.hom))

proof: function[T0: Monoid, T1: Monoid](x0: MonoidHom[T0, T1], x1: MonoidHom[T0, T1]) { x0.hom != x1.hom or x0 = x1 }[A, D](rhs, lhs)
let w0: M satisfy { lhs.hom(w0) != compose[M, N, N](identity_monoid_hom[N].hom, f.hom, w0) }

function[T0: Monoid, T1: Monoid, T2: Monoid](x0: MonoidHom[T1, T2], x1: MonoidHom[T0, T1], x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0.hom, x1.hom, x2) = compose_monoid_hom[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1).hom(x2) }[M, N, N](identity_monoid_hom[N], f, w0)
function[T0: Monoid] { Option.some[MonoidHom[T0, T0]](identity_monoid_hom[T0]) = MonoidHom.new[T0, T0](identity_fn[T0]) }[N]
let w0: N satisfy { identity_fn(w0) != identity_monoid_hom[N].hom(w0) }

function[T0: Monoid, T1: Monoid](x0: MonoidHom[T0, T1], x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { Option.some[MonoidHom[T0, T1]](x0) != MonoidHom.new[T0, T1](x1) or x0.hom(x2) = x1(x2) }[N, N](identity_monoid_hom[N], identity_fn[N], w0)
function[T0: Monoid, T1: Monoid](x0: MonoidHom[T0, T1], x1: MonoidHom[T0, T1]) { x0.hom != x1.hom or x0 = x1 }[M, N](compose_monoid_hom[M, N, N](identity_monoid_hom[N], f), f)
let w0: M satisfy { lhs.hom(w0) != compose[M, M, N](f.hom, identity_monoid_hom[M].hom, w0) }

function[T0: Monoid, T1: Monoid, T2: Monoid](x0: MonoidHom[T1, T2], x1: MonoidHom[T0, T1], x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0.hom, x1.hom, x2) = compose_monoid_hom[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1).hom(x2) }[M, M, N](f, identity_monoid_hom[M], w0)

let w0: M satisfy { identity_fn(w0) != identity_monoid_hom[M].hom(w0) }

function[T0: Monoid, T1: Monoid](x0: MonoidHom[T0, T1], x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { Option.some[MonoidHom[T0, T1]](x0) != MonoidHom.new[T0, T1](x1) or x0.hom(x2) = x1(x2) }[M, M](identity_monoid_hom[M], identity_fn[M], w0)
function[T0: Monoid, T1: Monoid](x0: MonoidHom[T0, T1], x1: MonoidHom[T0, T1]) { x0.hom != x1.hom or x0 = x1 }[M, N](compose_monoid_hom[M, M, N](f, identity_monoid_hom[M]), f)
